category_sources: source_facts.description says dvdauthor is a DVD-authoring toolset; official SourceForge page describes DVD-Video file and directory authoring.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official project page use dvdauthor.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project site has dedicated documentation under /doc, including the dvdauthor manual page.
repo_sources: Official dvdauthor project homepage states the repository URL is http://dvdauthor.sourceforge.net/darcs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DVD authoring; official docs describe command-line and XML control files for DVD-Video structures.
